<article class="single-page">
    <div class="container">
        <header class="page-header">
            <h1>Fluctus Planetarium: Everything About the Imminent Stable Release</h1>
            <p class="article-meta">18 September 2025</p>
        </header>
        <div class="page-content markdown-content">
            <h1 id="-fluctus-planetarium-the-stable-version-is-coming">🎵 Fluctus Planetarium: The Stable Version Is Coming!</h1>
<p><img src="/img/fluctus.png" alt="Final game icon of Fluctus Planetarium" width="256" height="256"> <em>Final game icon</em></p>
<h2 id="current-project-status">Current Project Status</h2>
<p><strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> is entering its final development phase with a <strong>stable version scheduled for September 2025</strong>. We are therefore in the critical period where this new version should see the light very soon.</p>
<h2 id="final-steps-before-release">Final Steps Before Release</h2>
<h3 id="technical-finalization">Technical Finalization</h3>
<ul>
<li><strong>Event cards balancing</strong>: Completed last week</li>
<li><strong>Rules proofreading</strong>: In progress, version 1.14.18</li>
<li><strong>Printed prototypes</strong>: Finalized, &ldquo;blind play&rdquo; tests were conducted in August</li>
</ul>
<h3 id="testing-phase">Testing Phase</h3>
<p>The game adaptation has <strong>entered the polishing phase</strong>, a crucial step that determines the final quality of the user experience. Blind tests will validate the game&rsquo;s ergonomics and accessibility.</p>
<h2 id="innovation-from-installation-to-interactive-game">Innovation: From Installation to Interactive Game</h2>
<h3 id="original-concept">Original Concept</h3>
<p>Fluctus Planetarium was born in 2023 from an artistic collaboration between <strong>Louis Jeanne</strong> and myself. Initially conceived as an installation for 8 giant screens with a 5.1 electroacoustic system, the work explores the encounter between abstract visual projections and spatialized musical compositions.</p>
<h3 id="game-transformation">Game Transformation</h3>
<p>Faced with the logistical and financial challenges of contemporary art installations, the project transformed into an <strong>interactive gaming experience</strong> accessible to the general public, thus democratizing access to this artistic creation.</p>
<h2 id="revolutionary-game-mechanics">Revolutionary Game Mechanics</h2>
<h3 id="reactive-audio-system">Reactive Audio System</h3>
<p>The major innovation lies in the <strong>reactive audio system</strong>: the closer a meteorite gets to a planet, the more audible that world&rsquo;s specific musical composition becomes, transforming the sound space into a musical exploration environment.</p>
<h3 id="gravitational-physics">Gravitational Physics</h3>
<p>The gameplay draws directly from <strong>celestial physics</strong>. Meteorite trajectories don&rsquo;t follow straight lines but curve under the gravitational effect of planets, creating controlled unpredictability that forms the core of the experience.</p>
<h2 id="collaborative-creation-process">Collaborative Creation Process</h2>
<h3 id="the-creation-workshop">The Creation Workshop</h3>
<p>The stable version will offer a <strong>complete creative pipeline</strong> allowing players to create their own planet:</p>
<ol>
<li>Import a portrait (landscape format required)</li>
<li>Deconstruction into abstract texture</li>
<li>Texture sonification</li>
<li>Acousmatic retouching</li>
<li>Integration into the game universe</li>
<li>Application to a planetary sphere</li>
<li>Physical parameters (mass, gravitation, rotation)</li>
</ol>
<h2 id="transmedia-perspectives">Transmedia Perspectives</h2>
<p>This stable version fits into my <strong>transmedia approach</strong>, where literature, electroacoustic composition, and game creation converge toward a coherent creative ecosystem.</p>
<hr>
<p>The imminent release of this stable version represents the culmination of an ambitious artistic approach: transforming a contemporary art installation into an accessible creation tool, where each player becomes a co-creator of the sound and visual universe imagined by the artists.</p>
<p><em>Stay tuned! Follow the project&rsquo;s progress on <a href="https://jcploquin.itch.io">jcploquin.itch.io</a></em></p>

        </div>

window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {

  } else {
    aLaUne.classList.remove('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = '';
  }

    <main>
        
<article class="single-page">
    <div class="container">
        <header class="page-header">
            <h1>Creating an Acousmatic Game: Behind the Scenes of Fluctus Planetarium</h1>
            <p class="article-meta">26 July 2025</p>
        </header>
        <div class="page-content markdown-content">
            <h1 id="creating-an-acousmatic-game-behind-the-scenes-of-fluctus-planetarium">Creating an Acousmatic Game: Behind the Scenes of Fluctus Planetarium</h1>
<p><em>How to transform a contemporary multimedia art installation into an interactive gaming experience? A look back at the genesis of a singular transmedia project, where gravitational physics and electroacoustic composition converge toward a new form of collaborative creation.</em></p>
<h2 id="from-a-multimedia-installation-to-an-interactive-game">From a Multimedia Installation to an Interactive Game</h2>
<p><strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> was born in 2023 from an artistic collaboration between <a href="https://www.instagram.com/louis.jnn/"><strong>Louis Jeanne</strong></a> and myself. Conceived as an installation for 8 giant screens accompanied by a 5.1 electroacoustic device, the original work explores the encounter between abstract visual projections and spatialized musical compositions.</p>
<p>Like many contemporary art works, <a href="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bXqjBT5cdLw"><strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong></a> faces a recurring challenge: the difficulty of finding sponsors and venues capable of hosting such an ambitious setup. Six giant screens, a multichannel sound system, the necessary space&hellip; Logistical and financial constraints drastically limit the possibilities for exhibition.</p>
<p>It was from this frustration that the idea of an <strong>interactive transposition</strong> was born: what if we transformed this installation into an accessible game, allowing the public to discover and even extend our creative universe?</p>
<h2 id="the-source-universe-deconstructed-portraits-and-musical-gravitation">The Source Universe: Deconstructed Portraits and Musical Gravitation</h2>
<h3 id="louis-jeannes-planets">Louis Jeanne&rsquo;s Planets</h3>
<p>The visual heart of <strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> lies in the <strong>8 planets</strong> created by Louis Jeanne according to a fascinating artistic process. Starting from nominative portraits—identifiable and singular faces—the artist subjects them to a <strong>systematic deconstruction</strong> that transforms them into abstract, mysterious, almost organic textures.</p>
<p>These decomposed portraits then become the <strong>surfaces of spherical planets</strong>, creating a spatial universe where humanity persists as a trace, as textural memory applied to celestial bodies.</p>
<h3 id="my-musical-contribution">My Musical Contribution</h3>
<p>Each planet possesses its own <strong>sonic identity</strong>: eight electroacoustic compositions that I developed in dialogue with Louis&rsquo;s visual creations, developing <strong>acousmatic scores</strong> from his textures. The 5.1 spatialization of the original installation allows for sonic immersion where each world resonates in the listening space, creating a three-dimensional planetary symphony.</p>
<p><img src="/img/partition_fluctus.png" alt="Original handwritten score of Fluctus Planetarium">
<em>Original handwritten score of Fluctus Planetarium – Excerpt from electroacoustic compositions developed in dialogue with Louis Jeanne&rsquo;s visual creations</em></p>
<p>This approach fits into my usual practice as an <strong>acousmatic composer</strong>, but with a new constraint: making sonic creation dialogue with an abstract visual universe, in a spatial and gravitational environment.</p>
<h2 id="game-mechanics-when-physics-becomes-gameplay">Game Mechanics: When Physics Becomes Gameplay</h2>
<h3 id="gravitational-trajectories">Gravitational Trajectories</h3>
<p>The game principle of <strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> is directly inspired by celestial physics. The player <strong>launches meteorites into space</strong>, but unlike a classic action game, the trajectories don&rsquo;t follow predictable straight lines.</p>
<p>Under the effect of <strong>planetary gravitation</strong>, these trajectories curve, deform, create ellipses. Sometimes meteorites enter <strong>transitory orbit</strong> around a world, sometimes they <strong>crash</strong> on its surface. This controlled unpredictability constitutes the heart of the gameplay: taming gravitational laws to achieve one&rsquo;s objectives.</p>
<h3 id="musical-triggering-by-proximity">Musical Triggering by Proximity</h3>
<p>The game&rsquo;s major innovation lies in its <strong>reactive audio system</strong>. The closer a meteorite gets to a planet, the more audible the <strong>specific musical composition</strong> of that world becomes. The sonic space thus becomes an environment of musical exploration: navigating between planets means composing one&rsquo;s own listening experience.</p>
<p>This mechanic transforms each game session into an <strong>improvised acousmatic performance</strong>, where the player&rsquo;s choices determine the evolution of the sonic landscape.</p>
<h2 id="the-creation-workshop-democratizing-the-artistic-process">The Creation Workshop: Democratizing the Artistic Process</h2>
<h3 id="the-collaborative-9th-planet">The Collaborative 9th Planet</h3>
<p>Beyond exploring the eight existing worlds, <strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> offers a revolutionary functionality: the <strong>creation workshop</strong> allows the player to build their own planet by following exactly the approach that Louis and I developed.</p>
<h3 id="complete-creative-pipeline">Complete Creative Pipeline</h3>
<p>The creative process breaks down into precise steps:</p>
<ol>
<li><strong>Import a portrait</strong> (landscape format required)</li>
<li><strong>Deconstruct the portrait</strong> to transform it into an abstract texture</li>
<li><strong>Apply the texture</strong> to a planetary sphere</li>
<li><strong>Physical parameterization</strong>: size, mass, gravitational field, rotation speed</li>
<li><strong>Sonification of the abstract texture</strong> into a raw sonic object</li>
<li><strong>Acousmatic retouching</strong> of the sonic object to create a coherent musical phrase</li>
<li><strong>Integration of the planet</strong> into the game universe and testing of interactions</li>
</ol>
<p>This sequence reveals to the public the <strong>technical and artistic behind-the-scenes</strong> of our collaboration, transforming the player into a <strong>co-creator</strong> of the <strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> universe.</p>
<h2 id="innovation-sonification-as-creative-process">Innovation: Sonification as Creative Process</h2>
<h3 id="from-image-to-sound">From Image to Sound</h3>
<p>The most innovative aspect of the project lies in the <strong>sonification</strong> step: how to transform an abstract visual texture into sonic material? This question, central to our artistic research, becomes a creation tool accessible to the public.</p>
<p>The algorithmic process I developed analyzes the visual properties of the texture (contrasts, patterns, colors) to generate a <strong>corresponding sonic object</strong>. But this automatic transformation is only a starting point: the <strong>acousmatic retouching</strong> step then allows sculpting this raw object into a musical phrase coherent with the work&rsquo;s aesthetic.</p>
<h3 id="interactive-acousmatic">Interactive Acousmatic</h3>
<p>Adapting my <strong>electroacoustic composition</strong> techniques to a gaming environment represented a considerable challenge. How to preserve the richness and subtlety of acousmatic listening in an interactive medium?</p>
<p>The solution lies in this <strong>hybridization</strong>: the game becomes a sonic exploration environment where each action triggers musical events, transforming gameplay into acousmatic performance.</p>
<h2 id="technical-and-artistic-challenges">Technical and Artistic Challenges</h2>
<h3 id="preserving-the-original-aesthetic">Preserving the Original Aesthetic</h3>
<p>Transposing a multimedia installation into an interactive game poses complex aesthetic questions. How to preserve the <strong>visual impact</strong> of six giant screens in a domestic format? How to maintain the <strong>richness of 5.1 spatialization</strong> on standard audio systems?</p>
<p>These constraints led us toward creative solutions: optimizing the visual experience for different screen sizes, adapting spatialization for stereo, preserving the essence of the aesthetic experience while making it accessible.</p>
<h3 id="physical-and-ludic-balancing">Physical and Ludic Balancing</h3>
<p>The <strong>realism of gravitational simulations</strong> constitutes another major challenge. Too simplified, trajectories lose their physical poetry. Too complex, they become unplayable. Balancing between scientific precision and gaming pleasure requires numerous adjustments and tests.</p>
<h3 id="blind-play-tests">&ldquo;Blind Play&rdquo; Tests</h3>
<p>Scheduled for early August, <strong>blind tests</strong> with new players constitute a crucial step. They will validate the accessibility of the creative process: can a user without artistic training really follow our approach and create their own musical planet?</p>
<p>I reassure you right away: everything has been designed so that the creation workshop tools are simple to use and perfectly ergonomic.</p>
<h2 id="perspectives-democratizing-digital-art">Perspectives: Democratizing Digital Art</h2>
<h3 id="gaming-as-cultural-mediation">Gaming as Cultural Mediation</h3>
<p><strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> represents an experimentation in the field of <strong>digital cultural mediation</strong>. By transforming a contemporary art installation into an accessible game, we explore new avenues for disseminating experimental works.</p>
<p>This approach responds to a major contemporary challenge: how to make accessible an art often perceived as elitist? Gaming, through its interactive and ludic dimension, opens unprecedented possibilities for <strong>artistic democratization</strong>.</p>
<h3 id="toward-new-transmedia-forms">Toward New Transmedia Forms</h3>
<p>The <strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> experience fits into my broader transmedia approach, where literature (<strong>From Death to Life</strong>), electroacoustic composition (<strong>Hydrophonia</strong>) and ludic creation (<strong>Music &amp; Me</strong>, <strong>Ascendance</strong>) converge toward a coherent creative ecosystem.</p>
<p>This approach allows exploring the same artistic universe from different angles, each medium revealing specific aspects of creation while nourishing the others.</p>
<h2 id="release-and-perspectives">Release and Perspectives</h2>
<p><strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> is currently entering its finalization phase, with a <strong>stable release planned for September 2025</strong>. Feedback from August tests will determine the final adjustments before making it available to the public.</p>
<p>Beyond simple entertainment, this project aims to propose a <strong>new form of artistic experience</strong>: a game that would also be a creation tool, an environment of aesthetic exploration, a space of collaboration between artists and audience.</p>
<p><strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> thus questions the boundaries between creation and reception, between elitist art and accessible culture, between passive contemplation and active participation. A transmedia experience that transforms each player into a co-creator of the sonic and visual universe that Louis Jeanne and I have imagined.</p>
<hr>
<p><em>The original Fluctus Planetarium installation (8 screens + 5.1) remains in search of sponsors and venues. Contacts for programming: &lsquo;contact&rsquo; page</em></p>
<p><em>Follow the progress of <strong>Fluctus Planetarium</strong> development on <a href="https://jcploquin.itch.io">jcploquin.itch.io</a></em></p>

        </div>
        
        
        
        <nav class="article-nav">

</article>

<script>

	const cdPopups = {

    image: "/img/normainn_cd.png",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Gary Owen", fichier: "/mp3/garyowen.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Normainn"
  },

let modeLivraison = "domicile";

function openCdPopup(id) {
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  let extraitsHtml = cd.extraits.map(e =>
    `<div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>${e.titre} :</strong><br>
      <audio controls src="${e.fichier}" style="width:100%; height:30px; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto;"></audio></div>`
  ).join('');
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = `
    <img src="${cd.image}" alt="${cd.titre}" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em;">
    <h2>${cd.titre}</h2>
    <div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>Prix :</strong> ${cd.prix}</div>
    ${extraitsHtml}
    <button onclick="ajouterAuPanier('${id}')" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:1em;">
      Ajouter au panier
    </button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'flex';
}
function ajouterAuPanier(id) {
	console.log("ajouterAuPanier appelée avec id =", id);
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  const index = panier.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
  if (index >= 0) {
    panier[index].quantite++;
  } else {
    panier.push({ id, titre: cd.titre, image: cd.image, prix: cd.prix, poids: cd.poids, quantite: 1 });
  }
  // Notification visuelle
  alert(`"${cd.titre}" a été ajouté au panier !`);
  document.getElementById('panier-btn').innerText = `🛒 (${panier.length})`;
  closeCdPopup();
}
function calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison) {
  
  const tarifs = {
    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.70 },
      { poids: 5000, prix: 16.60 }
    ],
    relais: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 4.55 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 6.65 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 7.95 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 8.70 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.00 }
    ]
  };
  const grille = tarifs[modeLivraison];
  let frais = grille.find(t => poidsTotal <= t.poids)?.prix || grille[grille.length - 1].prix;
  return frais;
}

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">
			 <div>
				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>

<script>
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  const aLaUne = document.getElementById('a-la-une');
  const header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
  if (!aLaUne || !header) return;
  const headerHeight = header.offsetHeight;
  const scrollY = window.scrollY;

  if (scrollY < 100) {
    aLaUne.classList.add('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = headerHeight + 'px';
  } else {
    aLaUne.classList.remove('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = '';
  }
});
</script>

<script>
let panier = [];
	const cdPopups = {
  'opus1': {
    titre: "Opus 1 : pièces acousmatiques de jeunesse",
    image: "/img/opus1.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",

    ],

    titre: "Éclectique",

    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Wayfering Stranger (feat. Juliane Gabriel)", fichier: "/mp3/wayfering.mp3" }

  },

    titre: "From Everywhere To Elsewhere",
    image: "/img/normainn_cd.png",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [

    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Normainn"
  },
};

let modeLivraison = "domicile";

function openCdPopup(id) {
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  let extraitsHtml = cd.extraits.map(e =>
    `<div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>${e.titre} :</strong><br>
      <audio controls src="${e.fichier}" style="width:100%; height:30px; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto;"></audio></div>`
  ).join('');
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = `
    <img src="${cd.image}" alt="${cd.titre}" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em;">
    <h2>${cd.titre}</h2>
    <div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>Prix :</strong> ${cd.prix}</div>
    ${extraitsHtml}
    <button onclick="ajouterAuPanier('${id}')" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:1em;">
      Ajouter au panier
    </button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'flex';
}
function ajouterAuPanier(id) {
	console.log("ajouterAuPanier appelée avec id =", id);
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  const index = panier.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
  if (index >= 0) {
    panier[index].quantite++;
  } else {
    panier.push({ id, titre: cd.titre, image: cd.image, prix: cd.prix, poids: cd.poids, quantite: 1 });
  }
  // Notification visuelle
  alert(`"${cd.titre}" a été ajouté au panier !`);
  document.getElementById('panier-btn').innerText = `🛒 (${panier.length})`;
  closeCdPopup();
}
function calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison) {
  
  const tarifs = {
    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.70 },
      { poids: 5000, prix: 16.60 }
    ],
    relais: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 4.55 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 6.65 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 7.95 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 8.70 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.00 }
    ]
  };
  const grille = tarifs[modeLivraison];
  let frais = grille.find(t => poidsTotal <= t.poids)?.prix || grille[grille.length - 1].prix;
  return frais;
}

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">
			 <div>
				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

  },
};

let modeLivraison = "domicile";

function openCdPopup(id) {
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  let extraitsHtml = cd.extraits.map(e =>
    `<div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>${e.titre} :</strong><br>
      <audio controls src="${e.fichier}" style="width:100%; height:30px; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto;"></audio></div>`
  ).join('');
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = `
    <img src="${cd.image}" alt="${cd.titre}" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em;">
    <h2>${cd.titre}</h2>
    <div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>Prix :</strong> ${cd.prix}</div>
    ${extraitsHtml}
    <button onclick="ajouterAuPanier('${id}')" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:1em;">
      Ajouter au panier
    </button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'flex';
}
function ajouterAuPanier(id) {
	console.log("ajouterAuPanier appelée avec id =", id);
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  const index = panier.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
  if (index >= 0) {
    panier[index].quantite++;
  } else {
    panier.push({ id, titre: cd.titre, image: cd.image, prix: cd.prix, poids: cd.poids, quantite: 1 });
  }
  // Notification visuelle
  alert(`"${cd.titre}" a été ajouté au panier !`);
  document.getElementById('panier-btn').innerText = `🛒 (${panier.length})`;
  closeCdPopup();
}
function calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison) {
  
  const tarifs = {
    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.70 },
      { poids: 5000, prix: 16.60 }
    ],
    relais: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 4.55 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 6.65 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 7.95 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 8.70 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.00 }
    ]
  };
  const grille = tarifs[modeLivraison];
  let frais = grille.find(t => poidsTotal <= t.poids)?.prix || grille[grille.length - 1].prix;
  return frais;
}

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">
			 <div>
				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  const aLaUne = document.getElementById('a-la-une');
  const header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
  if (!aLaUne || !header) return;
  const headerHeight = header.offsetHeight;
  const scrollY = window.scrollY;

  if (scrollY < 100) {
    aLaUne.classList.add('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = headerHeight + 'px';
  } else {
    aLaUne.classList.remove('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = '';

}

      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">

    </div>

      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});

      modeLivraison = this.value;

    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');

  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');

    </div>

        <div class="banner-slice">
            <img src="/img/banniere-tranche.jpg" alt="Bandeau graphique" class="banner-slice-img">
        </div>
    

    <main>

  <h1>Games</h1>
  <div>

    <h2>Articles</h2>
    <ul>

<script>
let panier = [];
	const cdPopups = {
  'opus1': {
    titre: "Opus 1 : pièces acousmatiques de jeunesse",
    image: "/img/opus1.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Métalloïdes", fichier: "/mp3/metalloides.mp3" },
      { titre: "Bombay-Paris-Bombay", fichier: "/mp3/bombay.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Opus%201"
  },
  'hydrophonia': {
    titre: "Hydrophonia",
    image: "/img/hydrophonia.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 172,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Cosmogenesis", fichier: "/mp3/cosmogenesis.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Hydrophonia"
  },
  'renaissance': {
    titre: "ReNaissance",
    image: "/img/renaissance.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Cripple Creek (Leo Kottke)", fichier: "/mp3/Cripple_Creek.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20ReNaissance"
  },
  'eclectique': {
    titre: "Éclectique",
    image: "/img/eclectique.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Wayfering Stranger (feat. Juliane Gabriel)", fichier: "/mp3/wayfering.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Éclectique"
  },
  'normainn': {
    titre: "From Everywhere To Elsewhere",
    image: "/img/normainn_cd.png",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Gary Owen", fichier: "/mp3/garyowen.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Normainn"
  },
};

let modeLivraison = "domicile";

function openCdPopup(id) {
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  let extraitsHtml = cd.extraits.map(e =>
    `<div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>${e.titre} :</strong><br>
      <audio controls src="${e.fichier}" style="width:100%; height:30px; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto;"></audio></div>`
  ).join('');
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = `
    <img src="${cd.image}" alt="${cd.titre}" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em;">
    <h2>${cd.titre}</h2>
    <div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>Prix :</strong> ${cd.prix}</div>
    ${extraitsHtml}
    <button onclick="ajouterAuPanier('${id}')" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:1em;">
      Ajouter au panier
    </button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'flex';
}
function ajouterAuPanier(id) {
	console.log("ajouterAuPanier appelée avec id =", id);
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  const index = panier.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
  if (index >= 0) {
    panier[index].quantite++;
  } else {
    panier.push({ id, titre: cd.titre, image: cd.image, prix: cd.prix, poids: cd.poids, quantite: 1 });
  }
  // Notification visuelle
  alert(`"${cd.titre}" a été ajouté au panier !`);
  document.getElementById('panier-btn').innerText = `🛒 (${panier.length})`;
  closeCdPopup();
}
function calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison) {
  
  const tarifs = {
    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.70 },
      { poids: 5000, prix: 16.60 }
    ],
    relais: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 4.55 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 6.65 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 7.95 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 8.70 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.00 }
    ]
  };
  const grille = tarifs[modeLivraison];
  let frais = grille.find(t => poidsTotal <= t.poids)?.prix || grille[grille.length - 1].prix;
  return frais;
}

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">
			 <div>
				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

<script>
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  const aLaUne = document.getElementById('a-la-une');
  const header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
  if (!aLaUne || !header) return;
  const headerHeight = header.offsetHeight;
  const scrollY = window.scrollY;

  if (scrollY < 100) {
    aLaUne.classList.add('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = headerHeight + 'px';
  } else {
    aLaUne.classList.remove('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = '';
  }
});
</script>

}

    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';

		 afficherPanier();

});

}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>


===== ./public/en/categories/news/index.html =====

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
	<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Exo:400,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
   <meta charset="UTF-8">
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
   <title>News - Jean-Christophe Ploquin &amp; Arthur Gyl: two faces of an artist</title>
   <meta name="description" content="Musique haptique et installations immersives">
   <link rel="stylesheet" href="/css/style.css">
   <script data-goatcounter="https://jcploquin.goatcounter.com/count"
          async src="//gc.zgo.at/count.js"></script>
</head>
<script>
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  const aLaUne = document.getElementById('a-la-une');
  const header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
  if (!aLaUne || !header) return;
  const headerHeight = header.offsetHeight;
  const scrollY = window.scrollY;

  if (scrollY < 100) {
    aLaUne.classList.add('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = headerHeight + 'px';
  } else {
    aLaUne.classList.remove('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = '';
  }
});
</script>

<body>

<script>
let panier = [];
	const cdPopups = {
  'opus1': {
    titre: "Opus 1 : pièces acousmatiques de jeunesse",
    image: "/img/opus1.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Métalloïdes", fichier: "/mp3/metalloides.mp3" },
      { titre: "Bombay-Paris-Bombay", fichier: "/mp3/bombay.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Opus%201"
  },
  'hydrophonia': {
    titre: "Hydrophonia",
    image: "/img/hydrophonia.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 172,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Cosmogenesis", fichier: "/mp3/cosmogenesis.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Hydrophonia"
  },
  'renaissance': {
    titre: "ReNaissance",
    image: "/img/renaissance.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Cripple Creek (Leo Kottke)", fichier: "/mp3/Cripple_Creek.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20ReNaissance"
  },
  'eclectique': {
    titre: "Éclectique",
    image: "/img/eclectique.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Wayfering Stranger (feat. Juliane Gabriel)", fichier: "/mp3/wayfering.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Éclectique"
  },
  'normainn': {
    titre: "From Everywhere To Elsewhere",
    image: "/img/normainn_cd.png",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Gary Owen", fichier: "/mp3/garyowen.mp3" }
    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Normainn"
  },
};

let modeLivraison = "domicile";

function openCdPopup(id) {
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  let extraitsHtml = cd.extraits.map(e =>
    `<div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>${e.titre} :</strong><br>
      <audio controls src="${e.fichier}" style="width:100%; height:30px; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto;"></audio></div>`
  ).join('');
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = `
    <img src="${cd.image}" alt="${cd.titre}" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em;">
    <h2>${cd.titre}</h2>
    <div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>Prix :</strong> ${cd.prix}</div>
    ${extraitsHtml}
    <button onclick="ajouterAuPanier('${id}')" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:1em;">
      Ajouter au panier
    </button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'flex';
}
function ajouterAuPanier(id) {
	console.log("ajouterAuPanier appelée avec id =", id);
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  const index = panier.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
  if (index >= 0) {
    panier[index].quantite++;
  } else {
    panier.push({ id, titre: cd.titre, image: cd.image, prix: cd.prix, poids: cd.poids, quantite: 1 });
  }
  // Notification visuelle
  alert(`"${cd.titre}" a été ajouté au panier !`);
  document.getElementById('panier-btn').innerText = `🛒 (${panier.length})`;
  closeCdPopup();
}
function calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison) {
  
  const tarifs = {
    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.70 },
      { poids: 5000, prix: 16.60 }
    ],
    relais: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 4.55 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 6.65 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 7.95 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 8.70 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.00 }
    ]
  };
  const grille = tarifs[modeLivraison];
  let frais = grille.find(t => poidsTotal <= t.poids)?.prix || grille[grille.length - 1].prix;
  return frais;
}

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">
			 <div>
				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">

				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>

</body>
</html>

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
	<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Exo:400,700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
   <meta charset="UTF-8">
   <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">

   <meta name="description" content="Musique haptique et installations immersives">

          async src="//gc.zgo.at/count.js"></script>

<script>
window.addEventListener('scroll', function() {
  const aLaUne = document.getElementById('a-la-une');
  const header = document.querySelector('.site-header');
  if (!aLaUne || !header) return;
  const headerHeight = header.offsetHeight;
  const scrollY = window.scrollY;

  if (scrollY < 100) {
    aLaUne.classList.add('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = headerHeight + 'px';
  } else {
    aLaUne.classList.remove('floating');
    aLaUne.style.top = '';
  }
});
</script>

<body>

<script>
let panier = [];
	const cdPopups = {
  'opus1': {
    titre: "Opus 1 : pièces acousmatiques de jeunesse",
    image: "/img/opus1.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",

    ],

  },
  'eclectique': {
    titre: "Éclectique",
    image: "/img/eclectique.jpg",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [
      { titre: "Wayfering Stranger (feat. Juliane Gabriel)", fichier: "/mp3/wayfering.mp3" }
    ],

  },

    titre: "From Everywhere To Elsewhere",
    image: "/img/normainn_cd.png",
    prix: "10 €",
    poids: 90,
    extraits: [

    ],
    formUrl: "https://framaforms.org/contactez-moi-1748363436?objet=Commande%20CD%20Normainn"
  },
};

let modeLivraison = "domicile";

function openCdPopup(id) {
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  let extraitsHtml = cd.extraits.map(e =>
    `<div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>${e.titre} :</strong><br>
      <audio controls src="${e.fichier}" style="width:100%; height:30px; max-width:400px; margin:0 auto;"></audio></div>`
  ).join('');
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = `
    <img src="${cd.image}" alt="${cd.titre}" style="width:100%; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em;">
    <h2>${cd.titre}</h2>
    <div style="margin:0.5em 0;"><strong>Prix :</strong> ${cd.prix}</div>
    ${extraitsHtml}
    <button onclick="ajouterAuPanier('${id}')" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; border:none; border-radius:4px; cursor:pointer; margin-top:1em;">
      Ajouter au panier
    </button>
  `;
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'flex';
}
function ajouterAuPanier(id) {
	console.log("ajouterAuPanier appelée avec id =", id);
  const cd = cdPopups[id];
  if (!cd) return;
  const index = panier.findIndex(item => item.id === id);
  if (index >= 0) {
    panier[index].quantite++;
  } else {
    panier.push({ id, titre: cd.titre, image: cd.image, prix: cd.prix, poids: cd.poids, quantite: 1 });
  }
  // Notification visuelle
  alert(`"${cd.titre}" a été ajouté au panier !`);
  document.getElementById('panier-btn').innerText = `🛒 (${panier.length})`;
  closeCdPopup();
}
function calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison) {
  
  const tarifs = {
    domicile: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 5.25 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 7.35 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 8.65 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 9.40 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.70 },
      { poids: 5000, prix: 16.60 }
    ],
    relais: [
      { poids: 250, prix: 4.55 },
      { poids: 500, prix: 6.65 },
      { poids: 750, prix: 7.95 },
      { poids: 1000, prix: 8.70 },
      { poids: 2000, prix: 10.00 }
    ]
  };
  const grille = tarifs[modeLivraison];
  let frais = grille.find(t => poidsTotal <= t.poids)?.prix || grille[grille.length - 1].prix;
  return frais;
}

function afficherPanier() {
  let panierHtml = '<h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre panier</h2>';
  if (panier.length === 0) {
    panierHtml += '<p>Votre panier est vide.</p>';
  } else {
		panierHtml += panier.map((item, idx) => `
		  <div style="display:flex; align-items:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
			 <img src="${item.image}" alt="${item.titre}" style="width:60px; height:60px; object-fit:cover; border-radius:8px; margin-right:1em;">
			 <div>
				<strong>${item.titre}</strong><br>
				<span>${item.prix} × 
				  <select data-idx="${idx}" class="qte-cd" style="width:3em; margin:0 0.5em;">
				    ${[...Array(10).keys()].map(n => `<option value="${n+1}"${item.quantite===n+1?' selected':''}>${n+1}</option>`).join('')}
				  </select>
				</span>
			 </div>
		  </div>
		`).join('');
  }
  panierHtml += `
    <div style="margin-top:1em;">
      <label for="livraison">Mode de livraison :</label>
      <select id="livraison" style="width:100%; padding:0.5em; margin:0.5em 0;">
        <option value="domicile">Livraison à domicile</option>
        <option value="relais">Point relais</option>
      </select>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Frais de port : <span id="frais-port"></span>
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:0.5em; font-weight:bold;">
      Total à régler : <span id="total"></span>
    </div>
  `;
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'flex';
  // Ajoute le listener sur tous les selects de quantité
	document.querySelectorAll('.qte-cd').forEach(sel => {
	  sel.addEventListener('change', function() {
		 const idx = parseInt(this.getAttribute('data-idx'), 10);
		 panier[idx].quantite = parseInt(this.value, 10);
		 afficherPanier();
  });
});


  
  const selectLivraison = document.getElementById('livraison');
  if (selectLivraison) {
    selectLivraison.value = modeLivraison; 
    selectLivraison.onchange = function() {
      modeLivraison = this.value; 
      afficherPanier();           
    };
  }

  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  document.getElementById('frais-port').textContent = frais + ' €';
  document.getElementById('total').textContent = (prix_total_cds + frais).toFixed(2) + ' €';
}


function fermerPanier() {
  document.getElementById('panier-popup').style.display = 'none';
}

function validerPanier() {
  
  const poidsTotal = panier.reduce((total, item) => total + (item.poids * item.quantite), 0);
  const frais = calculerFraisDePort(poidsTotal, modeLivraison);
  const prix_total_cds = panier.reduce((total, item) => {
    return total + (parseFloat(item.prix.replace('€','').replace(',','.')) * item.quantite);
  }, 0);
  const total = prix_total_cds + frais;
  
  
  const resumeCommande = `Articles: ${panier.map(item => `${item.titre} (${item.quantite})`).join(', ')} - Livraison: ${modeLivraison === 'domicile' ? 'Domicile' : 'Point relais'} - Total: ${total.toFixed(2)} €`;

  
  let panierHtml = `
    <h2 style="margin-bottom:1em;">Votre commande</h2>
    <div style="background:#e8f5e8; padding:1.5em; border-radius:8px; margin-bottom:1em; border:2px solid #4CAF50;">
      <div style="font-size:1.1em; margin-bottom:1em;"><strong>Copiez ce texte :</strong></div>
      <div style="background:white; padding:1em; border-radius:4px; font-family:monospace; border:1px dashed #666; color:#333; font-size:1.1em;">${resumeCommande}</div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center; margin-bottom:1em;">
      <strong>1.</strong> Copiez le texte ci-dessus (sélectionnez + Ctrl+C)<br>
      <strong>2.</strong> Cliquez sur le bouton ci-dessous<br>
      <strong>3.</strong> Collez votre commande dans le formulaire (Ctrl+V)
    </p>
    <a href="/contact/" style="display:block; width:100%; padding:1em; background:#4CAF50; color:#fff; text-decoration:none; text-align:center; border-radius:8px; font-size:1.2em; font-weight:bold;">Aller au formulaire de contact</a>
  `;
  
  document.getElementById('panier-content').innerHTML = panierHtml;
}

function closeCdPopup() {
  document.getElementById('cd-popup').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('cd-popup-content').innerHTML = '';
}

document.addEventListener('click', function(e) {
  const modalCd = document.getElementById('cd-popup');
  if (modalCd && modalCd.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalCd) closeCdPopup();
  const modalPanier = document.getElementById('panier-popup');
  if (modalPanier && modalPanier.style.display === 'flex' && e.target === modalPanier) fermerPanier();
});
</script>
